name: He-man's Tuna Noodle Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Green Bell Pepper, Fine Chop
recipeInstructions:
An additional 3 oz can of Tuna can be added for a meatier casserole.  Ritz crackers (15 halves) should be broken but not crumbled.
1. Cook noodles in salted water; drain.
2. Coat with butter.
3. Preheat oven to 425 degrees F.
4. In a large saucepan, mix soup, milk, sour cream, salt, onion, pimiento, pepper, and celery. Cook over low heat, stirring frequently, for 15 minutes.
5. Add tuna. Combine with noodles and pour into 2-quart casserole.
6. Sprinkle top with Ritz crackers.
7. Bake 20 to 25 minutes.
8. Garnish with parsley before serving. Makes enough for 6 hungry men.
